Description: "Add the CosmicDriftFull React component before the router switch, and wire it into the template switch so cards with template=cosmicdrift render the space theme. The component uses the same card props (recipient_name, sender_name, title, messages) as the other templates, with multi-canvas star/nebula/constellation rendering done via useRef/useEffect."
Instruction: "Add CosmicDriftFull component before GreetingCardPreviewContent and add its case to the template switch"
